Class IssueTest

java.lang.Object
tests.IssueTest
public class IssueTest extends Object
Unit tests for the Issue class. These tests verify correct validation, state changes, and behavior of Issue objects.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    IssueTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setUp()
     
    void
    tearDown()
     
    void
    testAddCorrectTags()
    Verifies that valid tags are correctly stored and can be retrieved from the Issue.
    void
    testAddDueDateBeforeNow()
    Verifies that setting a due date in the past throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    void
    testAddVariousTags(String tag)
    Verifies that adding various tag values (including empty or blank strings) does not throw exceptions.
    void
    testAssignNullUser()
    Verifies that assigning a null user throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    void
    testAssignUser()
    Verifies that a valid user can be assigned and is correctly stored in the Issue.
    void
    testSetPriority(Priority priority)
    Verifies that all Priority enum values can be set without throwing an exception.
    void
    testSetStatus(BugStatus status)
    Verifies that all BugStatus enum values can be set without throwing an exception.
    void
    testShortIssueNoDescCreation(String description)
    Verifies that creating an Issue with a null or empty description throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    void
    testShortIssueNoTitleCreation(String title)
    Verifies that creating an Issue with a null or empty title throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    void
    testShortIssueNoUserCreation()
    Verifies that creating an Issue without a reporter (User) throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    void
    testShortIssueValidCreation()
    Verifies that an Issue with valid title, description, and reporter is created successfully.
    void
    testUpdateFromDifferentFields()
    Verifies that updateFrom correctly updates all mutable fields of an Issue using another Issue instance.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • IssueTest

      public IssueTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach public void setUp()

    • tearDown

      @AfterEach public void tearDown()

    • testShortIssueNoUserCreation

      @Test public void testShortIssueNoUserCreation()
      Verifies that creating an Issue without a reporter (User) throws an InvalidIssueDataException.

    • testShortIssueValidCreation

      @Test public void testShortIssueValidCreation()
      Verifies that an Issue with valid title, description, and reporter is created successfully.

    • testShortIssueNoTitleCreation

      @ParameterizedTest @NullSource @EmptySource public void testShortIssueNoTitleCreation(String title)
      Verifies that creating an Issue with a null or empty title throws an InvalidIssueDataException.

    • testShortIssueNoDescCreation

      @ParameterizedTest @NullSource @EmptySource public void testShortIssueNoDescCreation(String description)
      Verifies that creating an Issue with a null or empty description throws an InvalidIssueDataException.

    • testAddDueDateBeforeNow

      @Test public void testAddDueDateBeforeNow()
      Verifies that setting a due date in the past throws an InvalidIssueDataException.

    • testSetPriority

      @ParameterizedTest @EnumSource(Priority.class) public void testSetPriority(Priority priority)
      Verifies that all Priority enum values can be set without throwing an exception.

    • testSetStatus

      @ParameterizedTest @EnumSource(BugStatus.class) public void testSetStatus(BugStatus status)
      Verifies that all BugStatus enum values can be set without throwing an exception.

    • testAssignNullUser

      @Test public void testAssignNullUser()
      Verifies that assigning a null user throws an InvalidIssueDataException.

    • testAssignUser

      @Test public void testAssignUser()
      Verifies that a valid user can be assigned and is correctly stored in the Issue.

    • testAddVariousTags

      @ParameterizedTest @ValueSource(strings={""," ","tag1"}) public void testAddVariousTags(String tag)
      Verifies that adding various tag values (including empty or blank strings) does not throw exceptions.

    • testAddCorrectTags

      @Test public void testAddCorrectTags()
      Verifies that valid tags are correctly stored and can be retrieved from the Issue.

    • testUpdateFromDifferentFields

      @Test public void testUpdateFromDifferentFields()
      Verifies that updateFrom correctly updates all mutable fields of an Issue using another Issue instance.
